name: ChkStart_LINMasterInitTimeViolation
title: ChkStart_LINMasterInitTimeViolation
syntax: dword ChkStart_LINMasterInitTimeViolation (duration MinTime, duration MaxTime, char[] CaplCallback);
description: Checks an initialization time of LIN Master. The initialization state is entered on switching on and on waking up.
An event will be generated, if the initialization time is out of the specified range.

parameters.description: Minimum time shall not be checked
Maximum time shall not be checked

parameters.name: CaplCallback
parameters.description: Name of CAPL callback function to be called on generated event. In simulation nodes this parameter has to be set. In test modules this parameter is optional.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
